body.body: Extension of fork (#297). Branch fires only when guard expression evaluates true. M-size, no design needed. See GitHub #298.
body.title: T-if-fork-primitive (#298) — conditional fork when guard evaluates true
body.result: if_fork habit type implemented in main.py (line 3815). Guard fields: milieu.valence/arousal/dominance, twm.attractor_salience. Guard ops: >=/>/<=/</==/!=. If guard passes → fires all branches in shared traversal context (same as fork). If guard fails → logs skip. Falls through to LLM either way. Syntax OK.
